name: coissant-2.0
description: Application de commande CroissantExpress — Projet de formation Azure DevOps

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test:all: cd backend && npm test && cd ../frontend && npm test && cd ../packages/shared-models && npm test --if-present
scripts.lint:all: cd backend && npm run lint && cd ../frontend && npm run lint && cd ../packages/shared-models && npm run lint --if-present
